EVENT.TEXT: Following new legislation in @@testlandia@@, black tea is only available on the black market.
@@testlandia@@ was ranked in the Top 10% of the world for Most Advanced Defense Forces.
@@testlandia@@ changed its national nation type to "Hive Mind".
@@testlandia@@ changed its national nation type to "Hive Mind2".
@@testlandia@@ changed its national nation type to "Hive Mind".
@@testlandia@@ changed its national nation type to "Hive Mind2".
@@testlandia@@ voted against the World Assembly Resolution "Repeal "Prohibition Of Unwarranted Digital Surveillance"".
Following new legislation in @@testlandia@@, contemporary art museums showcase the latest in centuries-old art.
@@testlandia@@ was ranked in the Top 10% of the world for Most Advanced Defense Forces.
Following new legislation in @@testlandia@@, appliance stores are finding spy cameras embedded in their unboxed merchandise.
